national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Lone Star Coins
buyers.payout_claims: "We buy more volume, so we pay more" — claims to consistently beat pawn shops and mall kiosks; live spot price shown on screen in-store; same-day payment by cash or check
buyers.testing_transparency: Electronic verifier (Sigma Metalytics) plus hallmark checks and certified-scale weighing; acid or x-ray assay used when needed — done in front of you at the counter.
buyers.evidence_notes: Site states "no appointment, no commission, and no obligation", 40+ years in business, PCGS/NGC authorized dealer, BBB A+ accredited, National Coin & Bullion Association and ANA member. Family-owned bullion dealer, walk-in only.

buyers.name: Elemetal (San Antonio)
buyers.payout_claims: Settlement based on "the amount of precious metal anticipated to be recovered and the current market price"; most karat gold settlements in 1–2 hours
buyers.testing_transparency: Refiner-grade recovery assay; the location page does not describe the specific assay method used.
buyers.evidence_notes: Self-described part of "America's Largest Precious Metal Refiner"; refines karat scrap, jewelry, placer gold, coins, bench sweeps, and bullion. Provides "a level of shipping insurance at no additional cost" for mailed-in material.

buyers.name: Gold Unlimited
buyers.payout_claims: "Market-based, same-day offers" — no rates or percentages posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says specialists test and weigh your items in front of you; specific testing method not described.
buyers.evidence_notes: Cash-for-gold page claims "over 40 years of integrity" serving San Antonio and "no pressure, no hidden fees." Also sells fine watches, diamonds, and custom jewelry, so classed as a jeweler that buys gold.

buyers.name: Dennis Jewelry Co.
buyers.address: 14701 San Pedro Ave #110, San Antonio, TX 78232
buyers.payout_claims: "We offer Top Dollar for your Gold, Diamonds and Rolex's" — no rates posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Fine jewelry retailer "serving the South Texas Community and its families since 1936" with a dedicated we-buy-gold page; names specific buyers to ask for (Jason Dennis or Bobby Seiler).

buyers.name: San Antonio Jewelry
buyers.address: 1874 N Loop 1604 W, San Antonio, TX 78248
buyers.hours: Mon–Fri 9:30am–4:30pm, Sat by appointment, closed Sun
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described; site says the owners personally evaluate each piece for gold and silver trading.
buyers.evidence_notes: "Established as a coin trading company in 1980," now a jewelry retailer with a dedicated gold-and-silver-exchange page where you can "buy, sell, trade or value gold and silver."

buyers.name: San Antonio Gold Rush LLC
buyers.address: 10154 Culebra Road, Suite 101, San Antonio, TX 78251
buyers.payout_claims: "We beat anyone's prices" and "We Pay You Top Dollar" — no percentages posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site; staff credentials include GIA graduate gemologists.
buyers.evidence_notes: Established 2004, claims over 20 years buying precious metals, luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Omega, etc.), and coins. Also operates under the name "S.A. Gold Rush."

buyers.name: Nacogdoches Gold and Silver Exchange
buyers.address: 13323 Nacogdoches Rd. Suite #3, San Antonio, TX
buyers.hours: Mon 12pm–5pm, Tue–Fri 10am–5pm, Sat call first, closed Sun
buyers.payout_claims: "Pay Cash for Gold, Silver, Platinum, Diamonds & More"; "fair and honest appraisals" — no rates posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned, "serving San Antonio since 2008"; buys gold/silver/platinum and does in-house jewelry and watch repair ("All repairs are done in house with care!"). Address ZIP not shown on site.

buyers.name: Speedy Gold
buyers.address: 11103 West Ave Suite 135/136, San Antonio, TX 78213
buyers.payout_claims: "Get Paid Instantly — Cash for Gold"; claims "top-dollar payouts" and "consistently high offers" — no percentages posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site cites "advanced technology" and expert appraisers for precision appraisals; specific method not described.
buyers.evidence_notes: Dedicated cash-for-gold storefront open seven days a week; states "no hidden fees, no pressure tactics, and no lowball offers." No years-in-business claim found, so longevity unverified.
